summary: Door fix for v1 finding #1 is non-deterministic: app.Type[name].Fields (and data.Type via the same cache) is null on a fraction of clean-build runs because the entity cache is first-wins TryAdd over an unordered type set with PLang-name collisions (e.g. 'goal'); its proof-test fails 8/8 in isolation. One dead enumerator (goal/list.All) remains. Generator + perf fixes are clean.
